Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties, is present. Represented by
Attorney, Marina Franco, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Vanessa Smith and Jannette Smith, are present.
Attorney, Timothy Moppin, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Debroah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed

This case settled, the trial date of Mar-01-2010 is vacated.
